why_this_action: The live audit still says the bottleneck is distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already inside its measurement window, and Reddit remains structurally weak. Vibehackers has a fresh 2026 AI coding tools comparison with the right evaluator audience, no existing Ralph Workflow mention, and a real public team email, so this was the strongest fresh Codeberg-primary distribution move I could actually execute right now.
